name: status-line
description: Additive status line with green-to-red gradient indicators for context window and 5h / 7d rate-limit quotas. Single-process (node only). Configurable ordered elements (ctx / 5h / 7d / model / dir / branch / gap), switchable via /statusline-mode. A Nerd Font is recommended for the powerline glyphs. Run /install-statusline once to enable.
